_meta.name: Dataverse Event Trigger
_meta.description: Dataverse SubscribeWebhookTrigger for row added, modified, or deleted events. Use for flows that react to Dataverse table changes.

placeholders.{{TABLE_NAME}}: Dataverse table logical name (e.g. accounts, contacts, incidents)
placeholders.{{SCOPE}}: Trigger scope: Organization, BusinessUnit, ParentChildBusinessUnit, User
placeholders.{{SELECT_COLUMNS}}: Comma-separated column names to monitor for changes (optional, Modification only)
placeholders.{{FILTER_EXPRESSION}}: OData filter expression (optional, e.g. statecode eq 0)
placeholders.{{CONN_REF_LOGICAL}}: Connection reference logical name for Dataverse connector

_notes.message_codes: 1 = Addition, 2 = Deletion, 3 = Modification, 4 = Addition+Modification, 5 = Addition+Deletion, 6 = Modification+Deletion, 7 = All
_notes.filtering_attributes: For Modification, specify columns to avoid triggers on every field change. Empty = all columns.
_notes.body_access: Access row data via @triggerOutputs()?['body']. Primary key via @triggerOutputs()?['body/primaryId'].
_notes.webhook_vs_polling: Dataverse uses webhook (near real-time), not polling. No polling interval concerns.
